title: FullStory Webhook Endpoint
description: A configured webhook endpoint in FullStory that receives real-time event notifications. Endpoints define a destination URL, the event types to receive, and a signing secret for payload verification.

id.description: Unique identifier for the webhook endpoint

url.description: The destination URL that receives webhook event notifications

events.description: The event types configured for this endpoint

signingSecret.description: Secret used to sign webhook payloads for verification by the receiving application

enabled.description: Whether the endpoint is actively receiving events

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the endpoint was created

EventTypeConfig.description: Configuration for a specific event type on a webhook endpoint

eventName.description: The name of the event type

subcategory.description: Required subcategory for event types that support it, such as specifying which custom event to listen for

EventType.description: A webhook event type available in FullStory

eventName.description: The name of the event type

description.description: Human-readable description of the event type

hasSubcategories.description: Whether this event type requires a subcategory when configuring an endpoint
